acceptance_summary: Repository Discussions list and category pages render pinned discussions, category rail, search/filter/sort controls, label/state filters, upvotes, empty category states, and community links.

Focused QA also exercised discussion detail interactions, category management, template preview/commit, poll voting, and issue-to-discussion conversion paths covered by the discussions E2E/contract surface.
fixes: Fixed discussions list SQL pagination placement and category section grouping.
Fixed discussion participants author id alias.
Rendered discussion body markdown to sanitized HTML.
Allowed category sectionId:null to clear a section assignment.
Fixed issue conversion discussion owner lookup.
Allowed first discussion template commit to compare against the generated default template SHA when no template file exists yet.
Hardened discussions contract assertions and E2E selectors/seed helpers against real DB state and strict Playwright locators.

commands.notes: podman reachable, opengithub-postgres-test reachable, .env/.env.test present, per-worktree CARGO_TARGET_DIR writable

commands.command: podman exec opengithub-postgres-test psql -U opengithub -d opengithub_test -Atc <discussion table check>
commands.notes: verified discussion tables including discussion_categories, discussions, discussion_comments, discussion_labels, discussion_pins, discussion_poll_options, discussion_poll_votes against localhost:55433 test DB container

commands.command: set -a; source .env.test; set +a; export CARGO_TARGET_DIR=$PWD/.scratch/cargo-target; ./hack/cargo_locked.sh test -p opengithub-api --test repository_discussions_contract -- --nocapture
commands.notes: 7 Rust contract tests passed against test DB

commands.command: cd web && set -a; source ../.env.test; set +a; export CARGO_TARGET_DIR=$PWD/../.scratch/cargo-target; PLAYWRIGHT_CHROMIUM_EXECUTABLE_PATH=/usr/bin/google-chrome npx playwright test tests/e2e/repository-discussions.spec.ts --project=chromium --grep 'repository discussions list filters'
commands.notes: focused discussions-001 browser flow passed; setup auth + Chromium test passed
cargo check, web typecheck, clippy, and biome passed after formatting the touched E2E spec

known_gaps: Full repository-discussions.spec.ts was not rerun after the focused PRD flow passed; Rust contract coverage for conversion and discussion management passed.
qa_pass_evidence: Fresh focused E2E, web unit, Rust contract, DB schema, and make check evidence support setting prd.json discussions-001 qa_pass=true.
